description: R3a-5 cross-app full-summary golden — ground truth for the al-sem → Rust differential harness. Captures the FULL per-routine RoutineSummary (R3a-2 core + R3a-3 cone/coverage) over the cross-app corpus WITH the dep hooks. The key test: a PRIMARY routine calling a source-bearing dep routine INHERITS the dep's capability facts in capabilityFactsInherited (the cone fires cross-app via the injected typedEdges). See scripts/r3a5-projection.ts.
capturePoint: post-computeSummaries WITH dep hooks (indexWorkspace → resolveDependencyArtifacts(noDepSummaries:false) → withDependencyArtifacts → resolveModel → buildCombinedGraph → injectIntraAppCallEdges → collectCitedDepEvidence → collectDepOrderIndex → computeSummaries)
note: R3a-5 is the FULL cross-app L4 summary (core + cone/coverage) WITH dep fact propagation. This is the final R3a sub-gate — after R3a-5, R3a is COMPLETE (L4 RoutineSummary at byte-parity, source-only + cross-app). The fixture reuses the R3a-4 chain dep (cccccccc-0001-0000-0000-000000000001, DoIt→DoWrite→Insert) with a workspace caller that exercises cross-app cone propagation.

matrix.note: primaryRoutinesWithInheritedDepFacts ≥ 1 is the anti-degenerate invariant: the cone fired cross-app (dep fact propagated to primary caller). This is the core of R3a-5. coveragesWithOpaqueAppsReason ≥ 1 covers the R3a-0 cross-app surface (symbol-only deps / unfetched deps produce opaque/external-target coverage reasons).
